combination_policy.conflicts_mode: unit conflict sets cannot co-occur in one combo
combination_policy.interactions_mode: direct delta_score plus extra_saved_bytes/shared_overhead_bytes for scorer-axis and runtime externalities

evidence_boundary.next_gate: materialize selected operation family, run locality/inflate controls, then exact auth eval before any score claim

search_space_policy.non_bruteforce_principle: rank by rate-distortion prior, component/scorer marginal costs, explicit interactions, conflicts, and confidence before any local or exact scorer spend
